2.name: Curtailment (Grid Wait)
2.description: Inverter is throttled or waiting for grid dispatch control signals.
2.resolution: No action required. System is waiting for Power Quality or Grid operator commands to resume full feed-in.

3.name: Over-Temperature Fault
3.description: Inverter internal heat sink temperature has exceeded safe operating limits.
3.resolution: 1. Inspect internal/external fans for dust blockage. 2. Clean the air intake filters. 3. Check for adequate ventilation clearances around the enclosure.

4.name: String Current Imbalance
4.description: Difference in string current input across SCBs exceeds 15% deviation limits.
4.resolution: 1. Check SCB string current fuses. 2. Inspect module strings for local shading or heavy dust build-up. 3. Verify DC input connector isolation resistances.

501.name: Cell Voltage Imbalance
501.description: The difference between individual cell voltages in a rack exceeds the maximum allowable threshold.
501.resolution: 1. Trigger and run a manual cell equalization cycle via the battery management system (BMS). 2. Check connections and torque on cell link bars. 3. Replace cell module if delta persists after equalization.

101.name: Irradiance Sensor Desynchronization
101.description: Plane of Array (POA) sensor output differs from adjacent sensor by >50 W/m².
101.resolution: 1. Clean the pyranometer glass window. 2. Verify pyranometer levelling and alignment angles. 3. Recalibrate sensor offset values.
